title: lindmania subsimplex
intro: Lindmania subsimplex, also known as the sub-simple bromeliad, is a species of plant in the bromeliad family. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties, and has also been used to treat digestive problems and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Lindmania subsimplex include infusions and decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically to the affected area.
